name: Phaya Media API
tagline: Generate images, videos, audio, and AI chat via the Phaya SaaS backend
description: Phaya is a FastAPI SaaS backend that gives AI agents a single REST API to generate images (Z-Image, Seedream 5.0, Nano Banana 2), videos (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Kling 2.6, FFmpeg local), audio (Suno music, Google Gemini TTS), and run LLM chat completions (Phaya-GPT, OpenAI-compatible proxy). All endpoints follow an async job/polling pattern — create a job, receive a job_id, poll for status until complete. Includes a credit billing system with per-endpoint pricing. NOTE: This skill requires a Phaya API key and base URL. All generation endpoints deduct real credits — see the credit table in SKILL.md before enabling expensive endpoints.

credentials.name: PHAYA_API_KEY
credentials.description: Bearer token for the Phaya API. Obtain from your Phaya account dashboard. Required for all generation endpoints. Treat as sensitive — deducts real credits on use.

envVars.name: PHAYA_API_KEY
envVars.description: Bearer token / API key for authentication

envVars.name: PHAYA_BASE
envVars.description: Base URL of your Phaya instance, e.g. https://your-api-host/api/v1
